title: At the Pharmacy
content: Clara went to the pharmacy after work because she had a headache all day. The pharmacy was quiet, and soft music played in the background. She walked slowly through the aisles looking for medicine. Near the counter, an employee asked if she needed help. Clara explained her symptoms, and the employee recommended some pain relief tablets. Before leaving, Clara also bought tissues and vitamins. Outside, the evening air felt cool and fresh. She hoped a warm shower and some rest would help her feel better by tomorrow morning.
